title: Ice Turns the Mood Cold
description: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Nico Robin, Luffy, Aokiji, Sanji, Nami. Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That should hold for about a week...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Good luck on locating your village.

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: The sea became an ice land...

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Sherry... We can cross the sea now!!

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Ok. Good luck, old guy and horse.

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Don't forget to change bandages, Sherry.

dialogue.speaker: Tonjit
dialogue.text: I really can't thank you enough...

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: Thanks, again! I won't forget you guys!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It became winter all of a sudden.

summary: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
